title: lophiolepis iranica
intro: Lophiolepis iranica, also known as the Iranian tree fern, is a species of lycopodiophyte (a type of vascular plant) native to Iran. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lophiolepis iranica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
